## Description

<!-- What changes and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- The PR title / commits must follow Conventional Commits (feat, fix, docs, chore, ci...). -->

- [ ] `fix` - bug fix (patch)
- [ ] `feat` - new functionality (minor)
- [ ] `feat!` / `BREAKING CHANGE` - incompatible change (major)
- [ ] `docs` / `chore` / `ci` - no release

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] If I changed `src/`, I ran `npm run build` and committed `dist/`.
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if inputs/outputs or usage changed.
- [ ] The PR targets `master` (stable) or `beta` (prerelease) as appropriate.
